summary:
INAUGURATION AND WEATHER INTERVENTION: Brandon asserts that a concerted prayer effort successfully protected the President during the recent inauguration, specifically deterring a threat involving trucks and vans. Brandon states that a sudden, severe Siberian cold front was a direct result of these prayers, creating frigid conditions that forced events indoors and discouraged terrorists from executing plots in crowded areas. Brandon clarifies that the absence of the predicted attacks does not mean the threats have vanished, but rather that adversaries were forced to re-strategize, necessitating continued vigilance.

DOMESTIC THREATS AND LEGAL PROCEEDINGS: Brandon recounts earlier visions of planned attacks in cities such as New Orleans, Nashville, and Las Vegas. Brandon anticipates another lone wolf attack in Las Vegas during a warmer season and claims that a broader plot involving over a thousand individuals targeting ten major cities remains active. Additionally, Brandon mentions praying for the Supreme Court to intervene and halt a judge's plan to convict the President. Brandon also addresses the President's failure to swear on a physical Bible during the inauguration, dismissing conspiracy theories by explaining it was simply a timing mistake made by the Chief Justice, and rejects fringe theories claiming the President secretly held power during the previous administration.

GEOPOLITICAL PREDICTIONS AND GLOBAL LEADERS: Brandon outlines several global shifts, asserting that George Soros will pass away and be replaced by his son, whom Brandon describes as tyrannical. Brandon states that Klaus Schwab will be removed and followed by a darker figure. Brandon further claims that Emmanuel Macron will rise to power embodying an antichrist spirit. In the Middle East, Brandon predicts Turkey will form a strong alliance with Syria to defend it, while Iran, despite receiving defense from Islamic allies, will be marginalized. Brandon describes visions of biological weapons resembling Agent Orange moving from Iran into Syria, alongside predictions of further plots against Israel and the destruction of Damascus. Finally, Brandon predicts Justin Trudeau will be replaced by a conservative leader, and that Canada, the United States, and eventually Mexico will merge into a single currency.

ECONOMIC FORECAST AND SPIRITUAL REVIVAL: Brandon declares that a four-year reprieve has been granted, resulting in a global spiritual revival and a significant financial shift. Brandon expects a massive transfer of wealth involving gold, silver, cryptocurrencies, and the Iraqi Dinar, leading to a golden age of prosperity in America. Brandon references the phrase drill, baby, drill to signify this upcoming wealth. Brandon views this period as an extended time of grace, during which intercessory prayer acts to hold back darker forces and shape the nation's spiritual and financial trajectory.
rawData: [January 21, 2025]-[What happened to all the trucks - and what the Lord told me is coming next]-[https://youtu.be/YA7dPUR6vRM]-[Hey, good morning family. I just wanted to say we did it. Praise the Lord, mission accomplished. When we set out to pray for the President back whenever the election was over, the Lord said, 'You must pray him through the inauguration, for there will be many attacks trying to come against him, against his life, and against the inauguration itself.' He said this is going to be a time of great intercessory prayer, and that's exactly what we set out to do. The Lord told me, 'Brandon, you're going to raise up a million-man and woman prayer army. You're going to pray throughout the whole world and change things in politics and things that I'm going to show you as a watchman on the wall.' That's exactly what we've set out to do on this channel—to pray to change things. That's what we named our church: Prayer Changes Things. Prayer Church was taken and Prayer Foundation was there, so we used Prayer Foundation. People ask why we use 'Foundation'; it’s because that's what they had in the state of Oklahoma. We're excited to call it Prayer Changes Things because that's what we believe here. Thank you for joining me in praying. I believe our prayers changed a lot of things these last 100 days. I don't know how many days that is from November 5th to January 20th, but it's a lot of days. God used us, ladies and gentlemen. Whenever He gave me this very strong warning about the trucks, the vans, and all the major attacks I saw trying to come upon America, I believe we delayed it, because the trucks didn't disappear. What I saw in the spirit did not just disappear. All I know is that when we pray with our whole heart as believers, we have authority over the devil. I know beyond a shadow of a doubt that we have that authority because I've seen it work. I've seen prayer change things over and over again. People get upset and say, 'You should have a little fruit of something.' Just because you have a window of time where you protected the President to get him in and it didn't manifest everything I saw, doesn't mean it went away. He said this is something that's going to take continual prayer throughout his presidency. There are a lot of bad people in our country right now that were let in across those borders. Just because you delayed or stopped something for a window does not mean it went away; it just means they have to re-evaluate because we exposed their agenda in the spirit realm and uncovered a plot. They may try to reassess and come at a different angle another day. You have to be smarter than that. When you uncover the enemy's plans, the enemy has to re-strategize. So, we pray and ask the Lord what their next plan is. The enemy is relentless. Our job on this channel is to continue to pray. It's amazing that so much of the world listened to that video instantaneously. People who are not familiar with the spirit realm and how things work when you pray are going to criticize and say that guy's flaky because they don't understand what God's called a watchman to do. A lot of believers say, 'You should have this or have that,' and I say that's why God didn't call you to tell people—because you're too worried about their opinions. I'm addressing this because it needs to be said; I'm not going to sweep it under the rug. Similar to other prophetic words that have happened in the past, I've told you all I do not believe I'm a prophetic voice. Some say I walk in the prophetic, but I believe I'm called to do what the people who mentored me trained me to do. Pastors and evangelists have poured into me, and I've listened to prayer teachings from my youth, sitting under intercessory prayer people like Sister Billye Brim and the WWPs. We expect to change things. The Lord warns, 'Warning, warning, warning; pray, pray, pray,' and we delay or stop them. That's what we are called to do on this channel. I want to keep driving this in with you all. That's what this channel's for, and that's what we will continue to do over the next four years plus. It's not just about America; it's going to be about praying over Ukraine and Israel. I've seen more stuff, but I've been slow to release it. I used to make a video the same day I got something from the Lord, but because the platform has grown so big, I'm taking the time to pray over what He's showing me. That is wisdom when you have millions of people following you. I had the word about the inauguration because I was praying. I asked, 'What are you going to do to stop these trucks and stop them from hurting all these people?' Where did the trucks go? He said, 'I'm going to bring in a major cold front.' I have this all on video; I can document it and show you. The Lord said, 'Brandon, I'm going to bring in a major cold front that is unusual. It will be so strong that they'll have to take it indoors. I will protect the people through the weather. It will be so frigid and the winds will be strong—a blast of cold air.' He said it to me three times. He said it will change the course of what I saw coming. Just like He said, it happened. My wife recorded it. She asked, 'Honey, should you tell them?' I said I was going to pray over it first, but it didn't give me enough time to make a video. People are cold and will not show up. In these cities, people are not moving around much because of an unusual cold snap. It will be a sustained cold snap, reinforced three times. You will see this as it alters the way people move. This is very unusual and deep. It will flow down into places like Florida, but I see deep purple up north in Ohio—deep purple cold. The Lord is doing it to protect the people. It's about the inauguration. This will start this week and alter the weather to cooperate with the plan. People won't come outside when it's really cold. Terrorists don't want to do stuff when it's really cold because they're looking for big crowds. Our prayers are altering the weather. He's working on our behalf. I keep seeing it being reinforced, pulling it down, and changing things so people don't want to travel. What's coming is to distract and deter. The Lord said, 'Call this and pray for Trump.' I heard today to pray that the judge's plan to try to convict him on the 10th be foiled in the name of Jesus. We say to that foul devil from hell rising up inside this man: you are bound in Jesus' name. You will not succeed in this plan. We have authority over this demonic spirit, and your plans are coming to naught. We call the Supreme Court justices to rise up and defeat this plan. These plots are over in the name of Jesus. The Supreme Court justices will rule in our favor, and it will happen quickly. The weather changed and got really cold; it was a Siberian front. From what I understood, it was the coldest it's been in over 40 years. We give God all the glory because He can use the weather to change things. If the world isn't hearing Him, He can use the elements of nature to protect. Look how big our God is, that He would use the weather to protect our President and the people. I saw those drones and the trucks, but He made it so cold it would be miserable to go out. Then He brought the people into the stadium. We interceded for the stadium; I saw that and brought a video out way before they even announced the parade and ceremony would be held there. We got that glimpse from some sisters in Australia to warn everybody. It's not all about me; other watchmen saw something in advance. So we started interceding for the stadium. We're never blindsided by the enemy's plans. Thank God for communion; we're going to take it today and rejoice. If you're a skeptic, stick around. We saw in New Orleans—God rest their souls—the attack the Lord showed us in prayer at my flower bed. He said there would be attacks in New Orleans, Las Vegas, and Nashville. We saw two of them, but we didn't see the one. Do you believe the power of prayer changed that one? I believe it did. I saw many men in Las Vegas; where did those other men go? It was a lone wolf. The Lord told me you'll see lone wolf attacks. Then the Lord showed me the strip again with the Bellagio and the fountains out front and the Eiffel Tower-looking thing. He told me to pray for Las Vegas, as we would see another major attack there in the future. I see in part and hear in part. I see leaves on trees, so I know the attack in Las Vegas is in a warmer climate. Is it February, March, or April? I don't know. He warns us of things to come. He said ten major cities with over a thousand men. Those men did not disappear; they didn't just pack their bags and go back across the border. This has been an ongoing plot for a long time. We will continue to stand in the gap and pray for America to wake up. President Trump, with this new administration, will find the evil and expose the darkness because I've seen a plague coming still. Everybody was freaking out about the Bible thing. 'Chicken Little, the sky is falling! He didn't put his hand on the Bible!' I posted that to see where everyone was at, and it was a mixed crowd. Bottom line is John Roberts, the Chief Justice who was swearing him in, started before the family could even get Melania up there with the Bible. It wasn't Trump being malicious; it was a mistake. People might say that's a harbinger, like Jonathan Cahn's harbingers. I'm curious what he would say. Will President Trump re-swear himself in on the Bible? I believe it's a vow to God to lead by His direction for this country as one nation under God. I don't think there's a conspiracy behind everything all the time. I don't drink the Kool-Aid. We can get off into some weird stuff with conspiracy theories and Q stuff, like people saying Trump was president the whole time during Joe Biden's inauguration. I don't believe that. Let's be balanced and keep our eyes on Jesus. I believe Jesus has made us the head and not the tail. We're going to go through these four years with victory. I feel hope, but I still feel the lingering darkness. We still have work to do. We're going to ask the Lord to protect our finances. The Lord told me, 'Brandon, watch George Soros in the days ahead.' I was shown George Soros passing away and his son rising up. I saw his son was more of a tyrant than George Soros. The Lord said these are the signs to watch. I saw Klaus Schwab, the guy over the WHO, being removed, and I saw a darker one coming up behind him. I saw George Soros passing away, and the Lord showed me Hitler again. He said, 'Brandon, this is an Antichrist spirit that was on Hitler.' You are about to see Emmanuel Macron rise up like you wouldn't believe. He is going to take an Antichrist role in the days ahead. Watch him, for he is an Ishmael before the Isaac. The Isaac is coming; he is being groomed. I saw demonic spirits grooming a man behind a curtain. The church, the ekklesia, the bride, is holding back that Antichrist man right now by our prayer. But an Ishmael is rising up, and it's Emmanuel Macron. You will see him take great power and make big moves. Then you will see the Antichrist spirit that was on Hitler; it's grooming the man behind the curtain right now. The Lord spoke to me and said Turkey will become friends with Syria and come to their aid. I saw a distressed Syria cowering down, and an Islamic brotherhood coming forth in a strong wave. When you see your brother being picked on, you defend them. Syria is wounded, and I saw Turkey rising up viciously to defend its brother. I saw great blows coming to Iran. All the Islamic communities—from Syria to Yemen, Oman, Iraq, and Iran—will try to band together. But as Iran is afflicted, people treated them like a 'red-headed stepchild.' They didn't treat them with the same brotherhood as Syria. I don't understand that vibe, but the Lord showed me that while they defend Iran, they don't really like them. You will see Iran, but they won't be treated as well as Syria or Hamas. I saw a plan being devised against Israel. Another major blow will come against Israel. I saw them regrouping and saw Damascus becoming a ruinous heap. As Trump comes in, they're going back into their holes to strategize. I've warned you about biological weapons coming out of the mountains of Iran into Syria and Damascus. I saw 50-gallon drums of a yellow substance—biological barrels. I've described this to people in the military, and they said it sounds like Agent Orange. This is what I'm praying over. I saw Donald Trump rising up, and I know they're going to make Canada and America one currency, and eventually Mexico as they take the Panama Canal. I have not seen anything about Greenland, so I cannot add that. I only saw Canada. I saw Justin Trudeau being removed and replaced by a more conservative person. They will have revival from sea to sea, from the Atlantic to the Pacific. I have seen a major revival coming throughout the whole world—one last push for a mighty harvest. America will rise up, and Donald Trump will put the pieces together. People ask about the economy crash. In October, the Lord told me that because His people humbled themselves and prayed, He is giving us a four-year window of reprieve. He is giving us an opportunity for change. It was decided in the courts of heaven to give an extended time of grace for revival and a financial outpouring. The wealth of the sinner is laid up for the righteous. You will see a major turn in finances through gold, silver, cryptos, and the Iraqi Dinar. This will be the greatest transfer of wealth the world has ever seen. I was disappointed about the 'Trump coin' because I didn't hear about it in time, but then it crashed, so maybe that was God's protection. I keep my eyes on Jesus. Don't worry about what everyone says on the internet. I was told that the President's family watches these videos. If you're watching, Mr. President, we love you and pray for you. We are raising a prayer army to protect you. God has a plan and purpose for you in these end times. We pray for your sons, daughters, and grandkids. Thank you for sacrificing your life. You released those people from January 6th and you're making America great again. Thank you from my family to yours. We will always lift you up. We've interceded for hundreds of hours. So let's take communion as a family and give God glory. We wrestle not against flesh and blood, but against principalities and powers. We have authority over the devil. Father, I thank you for President Trump and the Solomon anointing on his mind. You chose a man of character to help us out of this hole. Trump isn't the Savior, but he is a covering. We got rid of a bad covering, and the enemy is being restrained. When the righteous rule, the people rejoice. We thank you for the character of this man. Keep him in your hand and preserve him. Keep him from pride. Father, we lift up this body. You are the healer. We apply the blood of Jesus. Forgive this nation for aborting so many babies. We repent as a nation. I thank you for the states standing against abortion. There will be a clear dividing line between those that stand for God and those that don't. Seed time and harvest will excel. We plead the blood over President Trump, his wife, and children. I'm not a Pharisee; I love Jesus with all my heart. Thank you for taking this seriously. My wife and I pray for every one of you. The best is yet to come. I believe in 'Secret Service' angels—special ops angels protecting the President, my family, and all of you. I talk about Big George—he's real and he's my friend. God rebukes the devourer for our sake. I have the faith of a mustard seed. God is a rewarder of those who diligently seek Him. I've had a rough couple of days spiritually. The Lord showed me that when you get knocked into a ditch, a Good Samaritan might pull you out, but they aren't necessarily supposed to be in your life forever. You bless them and let them pass through. Some people are just there for a moment. Thank you to all the people who have helped me out of my ditch. 2025 has been an amazing year so far. I've seen storms, but we have a reprieve. Breathe in the victory of the inauguration. Father, I bless these people. We believe 2025 will be the year of babies for those who haven't been able to conceive. Everything they put their hands to will prosper. This will be a time of acceleration. Like President Trump said, we will 'drill, baby, drill.' I prophesied that he would say that. I thank you for the wealth coming to America—a golden age. Klaus Schwab and Emmanuel Macron will not be here much longer, but the Antichrist spirit is still here. If you're new here, please like and subscribe. We're reaching the lost one soul at a time through our YouTube channels in China, Japan, Korea, and France. Jesus loves you so much. God bless you all.]
